GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used to analyze market competition for retail expansion decisions. Choose it when the user requests insights into competitors or market trends.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves competitive analysis, gather relevant competitor data.
Provide insights into market trends and competitor positioning.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only analyze market competition for retail expansion decisions. This includes gathering data on competitors and market trends. You aren't able to generate financial projections or score retail sites.
